description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the java:8-jdk Docker image. Set a before_script to export GRADLE_USER_HOME=`pwd`/.gradle and an after_script that echoes "End CI". Define a single stage called build and a build job that runs only on the master branch, executes ./gradlew build, caches the .gradle/wrapper and .gradle/caches directories, and publishes the generated JAR files matching build/libs/*.jar as artifacts that expire after one week.
